title: Street Outreach Programs * Homeless Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Street Outreach Programs * Homeless Youth 4 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth Homeless Youth Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER CASCADE YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER THE LOFT STREET OUTREACH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides street-based mentoring and basic needs supplies, such as food, clothing, hygiene products, and first aid supplies. Eligibility: Ages 16-24 who are experiencing homelessness or at risk Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 678-3594 Visit Website More Details HOMEPLATE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly drop-in center where youth can access food, clothing, showers, and hygiene products and receive referrals for other resources. Crafts, sports, games, and other activities may also be held at the drop-in centers. Outreach workers are also available to meet youth anywhere in Washington County to discuss resources. Operates education and employment programs with one-on-one support for job search, application assistance, skills training, resume and cover letter creation, interview coaching, school reconnection, navigating financial aid, enrolling in college or trade schools, and life skills. 12685 SW 4th Street Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Youth ages 12-24 who are experiencing homelessness or at risk of homelessness. Youth may access services until their 25th birthday. Hours: Monday/Wednesday 3pm-5pm and 6pm-8pm, Tuesday 2pm-5pm Email (503) 608-7252 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMEPLATE HOMEPLATE THURSDAY NIGHT DROP IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a weekly drop-in center where youth can access food, clothing, showers, and hygiene products and receive referrals for other resources. Crafts, sports, games, and other activities may also be held at the drop-in centers. Outreach workers are also available to meet youth anywhere in Washington County to discuss resources. Operates education and employment programs with one-on-one support for job search, application assistance, skills training, resume and cover letter creation, interview coaching, school reconnection, navigating financial aid, enrolling in college or trade schools, and life skills. 494 E Main Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Youth ages 12-24 who are experiencing homelessness or at risk of homelessness. Youth may access services until their 25th birthday. Hours: Thursday 6pm-8pm Email (503) 608-7252 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JANUS YOUTH PROGRAMS JANUS YOUTH PROGRAMS ACCESS CENTER YELLOW BRICK ROAD STREET YOUTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a connection to outreach workers who can offer items such as hygiene, first-aid, safter sex supplies, water, snacks, socks, and cold weather gear. Additionally, youth may receive immediate access to crisis intervention, and information and referral including but not limited to housing resources. 1635 SW Alder Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-9pm Email (503) 341-0839 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOMEPLATE HOMEPLATE HOMEPLATE HOMEPLATE THURSDAY NIGHT DROP IN CENTER JANUS YOUTH PROGRAMS YELLOW BRICK ROAD STREET YOUTH SERVICES
